highlights.headline: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cleveland Cavaliers vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights) 2026/02/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 13 of his 32 points in the fourth quarter and the streaking Cleveland Cavaliers held off the Charlotte Hornets 118-113 on Friday night for their seventh straight victory and 12th win in 13 games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Donovan Mitchell scores 32 points as Cavaliers beat Hornets 118-113 for 7th straight victory

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Indiana Pacers vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/02/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Alondes Williams had career highs with 25 points and 10 rebounds in his 11th NBA game and the Washington Wizards swept a back-to-back set with the Indiana Pacers with a 131-118 victory Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Alondes Williams has career night in the Wizards' victory over the Pacers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Denver Nuggets vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights) 2026/02/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic had 32 points, nine rebounds and seven assists in 29 1/2 minutes and the Denver Nuggets routed the Portland Trail Blazers 157-103 on Friday night for the most points on the road in franchise history and the most in an NBA game this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nuggets rout Trail Blazers 157-103 for the most points on the road in franchise history

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic had 38 points and 11 assists, Austin Reaves added 29 points and the Los Angeles Lakers held off the Los Angeles Clippers down the stretch for a 125-122 victory Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka Doncic scores 38 and the Lakers hold off the Clippers 125-122 to split LA rivals' season series
